intent: Sweep fixture (MAX) for 1s_2br_sq_side_split_baths_cl_ld -- 12x12 m lot, 64.0 m2 buildable floor. Hand-picked (user-specified 10.5x10.5/11x11/12x12 progression for perfect-square shells). Note: this topology remains feasible well past this point (the gr sibling's own max is 17.5x17.5) -- 12x12 is a deliberately chosen round-number ceiling matching the 65-72 m2 floor band this program targets, not the true feasibility ceiling.
